title: malvastrum acaule
intro: Malvastrum acaule is a plant species, also known as Mexican mallow or buttonbush, belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant's extracts and leaves are said to have health benefits such as wound healing, soothing skin irritations, and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Malvastrum acaule include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be prepared by boiling the leaves and roots in water.
